title: NexCMS
tagline: Headless CMS with a clean API and a minimal admin UI.
description: NexCMS is a lightweight headless content management system with a REST API, a minimal admin dashboard, and flexible content type definitions — designed to be embedded into existing stacks without friction.
story: Built out of frustration with CMS tools that either do too much or require too much config to do anything useful. NexCMS starts from a clean API contract and builds up from there.
journey: NexCMS came from a recurring pattern — every project I built needed some form of content management, but full CMS platforms were always overkill and raw database access was always too raw. I wanted something that sat cleanly in the middle: a headless API with a minimal admin UI and flexible content types, without the 40-plugin setup. Building it also forced me to think carefully about schema design and API contract stability.
forWho: Developers who need a lightweight, embeddable CMS without the overhead of a full platform.

detailedSpecs.architecture: Express REST API with a React admin dashboard. PostgreSQL for content storage with dynamic content type definitions.
keyPatterns: Dynamic content type definitions via API
